mnemonics: GROW, SPLIT, MERGE: Gardeners Separate Regions Vigorously, Then Merge Everything (GROW = Grow Regions Outward With seeds, SPLIT = Split Picture into Large Irregular Tiles, MERGE = Merge Every Region that Gets Extended)
keyPoints: Region Growing: Starts with seed points and adds similar neighboring pixels
Region Splitting: Divides an image into quadrant regions until homogeneity is achieved
Region Merging: Combines adjacent regions that are similar according to criteria
commonMistakes: Choosing poor seed points that lead to under/over-segmentation
Using inappropriate homogeneity criteria (thresholds) for merging/splitting
Not properly handling the order of operations in split-and-merge algorithms
